Uses of Record Class
team44.project2.model.order.CartItem

Packages that use CartItem
Package
Description
team44.project2.controller.cashier.ordering
Controllers that manage the item-ordering workflow for cashiers.
team44.project2.controller.cashier.payment
Controllers that manage the payment workflow after a cashier finalises a cart.
team44.project2.service
Application-scoped service classes that encapsulate the business logic and direct database access for the point-of-sale system.

  • Uses of CartItem in team44.project2.controller.cashier.ordering

    Methods in team44.project2.controller.cashier.ordering with parameters of type CartItem
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    OrderingScreenController.addToCart(CartItem cartItem)
    Adds a fully customised CartItem to the current order, updates the ticket list view, and recalculates the running total.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    PaymentScreenController.setOrderData(int employeeId, Customer customer, List<CartItem> cart)
    Receives all data needed to process the order.

    Method parameters in team44.project2.service with type arguments of type CartItem
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Order
    OrderService.submitOrder(int employeeId, Integer customerId, String paymentMethod, BigDecimal tipAmount, List<CartItem> cart)
    Submits an order to the database within a single transaction.
